text:
(In reply to timp87 from comment #0)

The patch is incomplete for changes of license and dependencies.

> v1.0.0
> - Changed license to MIT from ISC

from setup.py:
    install_requires=[
        "cryptography",
        "ntlm-auth",

        "requests>=2.0.0"
